title: epilobium tetragonum subsp. lamyi
intro: Epilobium tetragonum subsp. lamyi, commonly known as the river beauty or great willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other urological issues due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Epilobium tetragonum subsp. lamyi include reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
